# Heading 1

## Heading 2 with `inline code`

Paragraph with **bold**, *italic*, ~~strike~~, ==mark==, H~2~O and x^2^.

> line two

- bullet one
- bullet two
  - nested
1. ordered
2. list

- [ ] task open
- [x] task done

```js
const x = { a: 1 };
console.log(x);
```

| col a | col b |
| ----- | ----- |
| 1     | 2     |

[link](https://example.com) and ![image](https://example.com/img.png)

Footnote reference[^1].

[^1]: The footnote body.

---

aliceEscapes.content:
# Escaping torture

Quote " backslash \ slash / tab 	 backspace   formfeed   carriage-return  end-of-line.

Raw controls: SOH  and US  between words.

Line separator   and paragraph separator   inline.

Non-BMP: crab 🦀, clef 𝄞, family 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦, flag 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿.
